base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of luigi_poseset — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Luigi — same poses as Mario. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Luigi — same poses as Mario; taller sprite (green cap); high-jump + slippery-traction stats
